transcript: Speaker A: ನೀವೇಂತು ಅದ್ರಾಣ, ಮನೇಲ್ಕೊಂಡು ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಯಕಾಗಲ್ಲ ಅಂತ, ಬಟ್ ಇಟ್ಸ್ ಬೀನ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ 15 ಡೇಸ್ ಅಂಡ್ ಬಿಕಾಸ್ ಆಫ್ ದಿಸ್ ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್ಸ್ ಮೈ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಹ್ಯಾಸ್ ಇಂಪ್ರೂವ್ಡ್ ಸೋ ಮಚ್. [You guys were saying that we can't learn English sitting at home, but it's been only 15 days and because of this AI teacher, my English has improved so much.] Speaker B: ವೇಟ್, ಒಂದು ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್ ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದ್ ಕಲ್ಸ್ತಿದ್ಯಾ? ಅಂಡ್ ಓನ್ಲಿ 15 ಡೇಸ್? ಇದ್ಯಾವ್ದ್ ಹೊಸ ಆಪ್? [Wait, an AI teacher is teaching you to speak English? And only 15 days? Which new app is this?] Speaker A: ಹೌದು, ಒಂದು ಆಪ್ ಇದೆ ಸ್ಪೀಕ್ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಅಂತ. ಅದ್ರಲ್ಲಿ ಒಂದು ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್ ಇದೆ. ಅದು ನಿಮಗೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದ್ ಹೇಳ್ಕೊಡುತ್ತೆ. ಅದು ಸಿಂಪಲ್ ರೀತಿಯಲ್ಲಿ. ನೀವು ಟೈಮ್ ವೇಸ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ರಲ್ಲಾ, ಆ ಟೈಮ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನಾನು 15-20 ಮಿನಿಟ್ಸ್ ಈ ಆಪ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ದಿನಾ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದ್ ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೆ. ಇದ್ರಲ್ಲಿ ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್ ಇರೋದ್ರಿಂದ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಮುಜುಗರನೂ ಆಗಲ್ಲ. ಮತ್ತೆ ತಪ್ಪಾದ್ರೆ ತಕ್ಷಣ ಸರಿ ಮಾಡುತ್ತೆ. ಬನ್ನಿ, ನೋಡಿ ಈ ಆಪ್. [Yes, there is an app called SpeakX. In that, there is an AI teacher. It teaches you to speak English. In a simple way. While you guys were wasting time, during that time I used to practice speaking English for 15-20 minutes daily on this app. Since there is an AI teacher in this, there is no embarrassment to speak. And if you make a mistake, it corrects it immediately. Come, look at this app.] Speaker B: ಹಲೋ ಮ್ಯಾಮ್, ನೀವು ನಮಗೂ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋಕೆ ಕೊಯ್ತೀರಾ? [Hello Ma'am, will you also teach us to speak English?] Speaker C: ಯೆಸ್, ನೀವು ನಿಮ್ಮ ಫ್ರೀ ಟೈಮ್ ಅಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಜೊತೆ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಮಾತಾಡೋದು ಪ್ರಾಕ್ಟೀಸ್ ಮಾಡೋಕೆ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಿ, ಶೀತಲ್ ತರ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕೂಡ 15 ರಿಂದ 20 ದಿನಗಳಲ್ಲಿ ಫ್ಲೂಯೆಂಟ್ ಆಗುತ್ತೆ. [Yes, start practicing speaking English with me in your free time, and just like Sheetal, your English will also become fluent in 15 to 20 days.] Speaker B: ವಾವ್ ಯಾರ್, ಈ ಎಐ ಟೀಚರ್ ಸೂಪರ್ ಇದೆ. ನಂಗೂ ನಿನ್ ತರ ಇಂಗ್ಲಿಷ್ ಕಲಿಬೇಕು. [Wow, this AI teacher is super. I also want to learn English like you.] Speaker A: ಈ ಆಪ್ ನನ್ನ ಲೈಫ್ ಚೇಂಜ್ ಮಾಡ್ಬಿಡ್ತು. ಇವಾಗ ನಂಗೆ ಎಲ್ಲಾ ಕಡೆ ಮರ್ಯಾದೆ ಸಿಕ್ತಿದೆ ಗೊತ್ತಾ? ನೀವಿಬ್ರೂ ಈಗಲೇ ನಿಮ್ಮ ಫೋನ್ ತೆಗೀರಿ, ಸ್ಪೀಕ್ಎಕ್ಸ್ ಆಪ್ ಡೌನ್ಲೋಡ್ ಮಾಡಿ. [This app changed my life. Now I get respect everywhere, you know? You both take out your phones right now and download the SpeakX app.]
on_screen_text: Neeventhu adraana, [You guys were saying,] Manelkondhu English [sitting at home English] kaniyakadala antha, [cannot be learned,] it's been only 15 days and because of this AI teachers my English has improved so much. wait, ondu AI teacher [an AI teacher] nimage English [teaches you English] maatadod kalthitiya? [speaking?] And only 15 days? Idyaade hosa app... [Which new app is this...] Howdu, [Yes,] ondu app ide [there is an app] SpeakX antha. [called SpeakX.] Adaralliwad [In that] AI teacher ide. [there is an AI teacher.] English maatadod [speaking English] helkodutte. [teaches.] Adu [That] simple ritiyat. [in a simple way.] 15-20 minutes English maatadod [speaking English] practice maadtidde. [used to practice.] Idaralli AI teacher [Since there is an AI teacher in this] irodhrinda [because of being] maatadokke [to speak] mujgaranu agalla. [no embarrassment.] neevu namgu [you also to us] English maatadokke hoytira? [will you teach to speak?] Yes, neevu nimma free [you in your free] time alli nanna jothe [time with me] English maatadodu [speaking English] practice maadoke [to practice] start maadi, [start,] sheetal tara [like Sheetal] nimma English kooda [your English also] 15 inda 20 dinagalalli [in 15 to 20 days] fluent aagutte. [will become fluent.] ee AI teacher [this AI teacher] super ide. [is super.] Nandu nintara [Mine like yours] English kalibeku. [want to learn English.] life-e change Ivaga nange ella [Now to me everywhere] kade maryaade [respect] sikkide goththa? [is getting, you know?] Neeribbaru igale nimma [You both right now your] SpeakX app download maadi. [download.] SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE Download SpeakX App PREMIUM Learn with Personal AI Mentor Unlock Unlimited Exercises 100+ Real Life Scenarios Get Personalised Feedback OFFER ENDS IN 00:09:20 Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A girl explains to her friends how she improved her English in 15 days using the SpeakX app's AI teacher instead of wasting time. She demonstrates the interactive AI teacher, prompting her friends to download the app and start a 7-day trial.
